value:
v1.12.2 shipped 2026-04-16. Consolidated export/import integrity patch covers #76/#77/#78/#79/#80/#87. v1.12.x integrity chain is DONE.

Side findings from the v1.12.2-beta.1 soak verification (2026-04-16), filed for later:
- #89 — data import silently drops shape-invalid sections at the extraction filter (src/commands/data-management.ts:244-259). Transactional guarantee only engages for content-invalid sections; shape-invalid (e.g. aliases: "not-an-object") bypasses it.
- #90 — import-size error hint hardcodes 'ccli' instead of getBinaryName(). CLI (data-management.ts:177) + MCP (mcp-server.ts:1056).

Still parked: #88 askPassword non-interactive path (v1.13.0 milestone).

Next: no active release. Pick up #89/#90 as bug fixes when ready, or move to Layer 2 seed-density tooling (#82 lint, #83 topology).
